explanation: The user wants all remote controls to be placed on a sofa. Since no remote controls are initially discussed or held, I assume there are at least two remote controls (remotecontrol_0 and remotecontrol_1) based on common household context. The plan involves picking up each remote control, moving it to the sofa, and placing it there. The sofa is a valid receptacle, and the robot can only hold one object at a time, so each remote control is handled sequentially. The motion to go to the sofa is necessary to ensure the remote control is placed correctly.
